titleStmt.title: SII 20.293: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 293. (B.K. No. 106 of 1938-39.) YELIVĀḶ, KUNDGOL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying in a ruined well near the Kalamēśvara temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1115 (given in words), Virōdhikṛit, Uttarāyaṇa. The cyclic year given corresponds to Śaka 1113 and not 1115. The intended date may be A.D. 1191, December 26, Thursday.

The inscription registers a gift of land by the One Thousand of the mahāgrahāra (name lost) for a well caused to be constructed by Ermmeyara Mādiyaṇa. It contains a genealogical account of the latter, and mentions Beḷvola-nāḍu. The beginning of the record is lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ntire beḷvalanāḍu nāḍe ku
vanitātiḷakaṁbolāgaḷuṁ . naḷanaḷidaḷagaḷameya maḍigaḷe yya survva
1. The stone is broken after this.

durvvīlalane pasureseva sārāvaḷiya māḍidantiradaṟa poṟavoḷaleseguṁ . sakaḷaha
sadvija sita puṁḍarīkāvaḷi lakṣmīramaṇiyaṁ varalakṣmīramaṇa niḷayamoppuguṁ
kuṁdagoḷa vasu(ṁ)ndharāmararella(ṁ)ruvakhiḷārtthaśabdāśāstrasrmitiya balmeccaya
lōbhagaḷanolla calakke nallarapratimallaru . Atiśayaguṇānvitarpparahitara
hita vākyarśśaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararbhbhūnutarene sāsirvvaresedarurvvītaḷa doḷ . praka
ṭāṣṭa vyākaraṇakāvyanāṭakapurāṇa bharata smṛtiṣaṭtarkkādikaḷāsa
rvvajñarenisuvarssāsirvvar . Ā mahāgrahāradoḷ . śrīdayitōdarasthitasa
rōjavaktrabhujōrupādaveṁbī dorevetta tāṇadoḷ vipramahīśavaṇikcaturttha reni
rbāḍiya nālkuvarṇnamogedattapaṟalli caturtthavarṇnameṁbadudiḷāvinūtamatipūtavadaṁ po
gaḷalke ballarār . Ā doreya vaṁśadoḷ śivapādapayōruhamadhuvratasakaḷa
janāhlādakaracaritane(ṁ)mmeya mādiyaṇaṁ puṭṭi siṭṭiyoḷu karamesedaṁ . Ā mā
dayyaṁgaṁ tatkāmini muddauvegaṁ manōmudadodavuddāmavoḍavuṭṭi puṭṭidanī mahi
yoḷagēcanucitavinayasuvācaṁ . guṇamaṇibhūṣaṇanenipēcaṇage ku
lalalane rūpavati patihite sadguṇavati samastaśubhalakṣaṇavati yēcavveyādaḷā yirvvarggaṁ
dore peṟatēnumilla dharaṇītaḷadoḷu doreyappaḍakkumī sthiratege gōtradhātrīdha ravuṁ
natiguṁnatamaṁdarācaḷaṁ śaradhigabhīrasāraguṇakaṁdujanaṁ sale kūrtu paṁte reya
maseṭṭi puṭṭi pesarvvettaniḷātaḷadoḷu niraṁtaraṁ . bhūvinutanātananujaṁ bhāvabhavākāra
nirjjitākāraṁ rākāvidhuviśadayaśāḍhyaṁ dēvaṇaneseda vinūtavineyōpētaṁ . ©
© Avariṁ nerggiṟiyanudāttavinayanidhi satvamaṁḍanaṁ dānasuradruviḷāsanogedane(ṁ) mmeyaravaṁ
śadoḷu mādiyaṇnananupamapuṇyaṁ . Antā mūvarssahōdararoḷage . smarasannibharū panā
dereyamaseṭṭigamanūnasaubhāgyaguṇākare mallavvegavogadarnniraṁtarōdātta
vinayarayvarttanayaru . piriyanavaroḷage guṇadoḷa raṁ tējadoḷaṁ viḷā
sadoḷamāriṁdaṁ piriyanene negaḷdu jagadoḷu virājipa satatapermmeyutamahīdharaṁ . tadanuja .
© dharmmadeṟavaṭṭu guṇada tavarmmane māntanada māta dāryyakkārmmaṁ satya permme
yoḷermmeyara kalliseṭṭige doreyāru . guṇada kaṇiyendu suja
nāgraṇiyeṁdu nijānvavāyanīrējanabhōmaṇiyendēcaṇana dhāriṇi manadolaviṁda
harṇniśaṁ varṇnisuguṁ . Ā kuḷatiḷakana tammanane rōttamaguṇagaṇākararājitasaumyāRead tammanena
kāranenisi vegaḷdaṁ lōkadoḷī nāganakhiḷadharmmōdyōgaṁ . © kiṟiyanavarellariṁ tōrppaReadnegaḷda[ṁ]
ṟivuṁnati taṁnoḷādamaḷavaddoḷpiṁ peṟanāvanītanantire neṟeda bhūtaḷadoḷeṇisidaṁ
yya . Intu pesarvvetta tatsuta santatiyiṁ dharame sogayipereyaṇnana ta(ṁ)mmaṁ tāno
sedu dēvaṇnaṁ tanayarayvaraṁ manaṁ biḍe paḍedaṁ . Anupamaśīlānvi
te sajjanasute dēcavve tanage tāyi dēvaṇna janakanene jagadoḷēcaṇnane(ṁ)rmmeyara vaṁśa doḷu
karaṁ pesarvvettaṁ . © dorevettēcaṇaniṁ nerggiṟiyaṁ dharmmaikacittanīśvarapādāṁ buruha śi
ḷīmukhanermmeyarereyaṇnanagaṇyapuṇyanesedaṁ dhareyoḷu . tadanuja [. v® .]
© vikaṭisida vīraripunāyakaraṁ harddiṁge birddanikkidaśauryyūdhikanermmeya balleya
nāyakanesedaṁ vasudheyalli gaṁḍara gaṁḍaṁ . Akuṭiḷanā balleyanāyaka
nanujanapārasāraguṇamaṁ taḷedaṁ prakaṭaśaśiviśadakīrtti prakīrṇnabhuvanaṁ nirantaraṁ mādēvaṁ [.]
Antā mādayyana tammaṁ (ta) kūrmmeyoḷamoḷpinoḷameḷeyoḷtaṁnanāvanenisi negaḷdaṁ
bontaṁ nijakuḷakumudvatīhrēmaṁtaṁ . Antā yirvvara tanayara santatiyene tanage dharma
sa(ṁ)ntāname satsantānamene jasaṁ baḍedaṁ tatkulatilakanermmeyara mādayyaṁ .
© Ā puṇyamūrtti śivagriha kūpa sabhāmaṁḍapaṁgaḷaṁ māḍisi digvyāpita
yaśamaṁ taḷedaniḷāpūjyaṁ jagadoḷermmeyara mādayyaṁ . vritta . Intu pogaḷte
yuṁ neṟe negaḷteyumaṁ piriduṁ vibhūtiyaṁ tā(ṁ)ntaḷedoppe kuṁdugaḷadoḷ
ja sadguru dēvatāprasādaṁ tanagekkalāvaṇamenalu bahudharmmamane māḍi cairaṁ
ntanamūrgganermmeyara mādiyaṇaṁ paḍedaṁ mahatvamaṁ . Aventendaḍe . taḍeya
de tanagolavindūroḍeyaṁ śrī dēvaṁ nelanaṁ kuḍe paḍedu bāviyaṁ biḍa
daḍurttu tōḍisidanemmeyara mādayyaṁ Amitaguṇaṁ pūjeyanīye mahōtsavacitta
vṛttaroldūroḍeyapramukhaṁ sāsirvvarssale namaśyamappa(ṁ)ntaśēṣamirddādaradiṁ
sarvvajñarssāsirvvarpparvvatakanyāvarakramāṁbujabhriṁgarpparvvanijasukri
tavallarīsarvvabhādhegaḷavāgadantire koṭṭar . sale yanile pervvasugeciṁ
cilaśatadoḷ saṁda mattarīreḷaṟinaggaḷamūnūṟadaṟiṁdaggaḷisida hadineṁṭu kaḍeya ka
rmmada keyyaṁ . kuḍe paḍedācaṁdrārkkaṁ naḍevantire taṁna bāvigā vrittiya nōḷpaḍavantu biṭṭu
jasamaṁ paḍedaṁ sale neladoḷermmeyara mādayyaṁ . janita śakābdada sāsi
rada nūṟa padineydeneya virōdhakridabdaṁ vinutōttarāyaṇaṁ kūḍe nērppaḍaṁ pa
ḍeye tadvyatīpātadiṁdaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 20.293 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
